name: secmp
description: Android security testing proxy with ADB certificate injection and traffic capture

secmp.windowsRuntimePath.description: Optional local Windows runtime directory. Point this to the extracted runtime directory, or to a parent directory containing runtime/. This takes precedence over archive and URL settings.

secmp.windowsRuntimeArchivePath.description: Optional local Windows runtime zip path. The extension extracts this archive into global storage when the runtime is missing or invalid. This takes precedence over windowsRuntimeUrl.

secmp.windowsRuntimeUrl.description: URL for the Windows runtime zip. Used when no local runtime path or archive path is configured.

secmp.windowsRuntimeSha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum for the Windows runtime zip. Leave empty to skip checksum validation.

secmp.windowsRuntimeVersion.description: Expected Windows runtime version. Changing this value forces the extension to install that runtime version.
